name: statewave-ide-companion
description: Make Statewave aware of your workspace, docs, git state, and diagnostics — then let Copilot/Cursor read that memory back via MCP. Does NOT read private Copilot/Cursor chat history.
author: Statewave <hello@statewave.ai>

statewave.url.markdownDescription: Base URL of your Statewave instance. Defaults to `http://localhost:8100` so a local instance needs zero setup. Set to empty to force preview-only (never ingest). Ingestion still always requires the explicit “Ingest to Statewave” action — a URL alone never sends anything.

statewave.apiKey.markdownDescription: Statewave API key. **Prefer setting this in your user/machine settings, not committed workspace settings.** It is never logged or sent anywhere except your configured `statewave.url`.

enumDescriptions: Use repo:<owner>/<repo> when a git remote is detected, otherwise workspace:<folder>
Always repo:<owner>/<repo> (requires a parseable git remote)
statewave.subjectStrategy.markdownDescription: How the Statewave subject for this workspace is derived. Override entirely with `statewave.subject`.

statewave.subject.markdownDescription: Explicit subject override. When non-empty, used verbatim and `statewave.subjectStrategy` is ignored.

statewave.autoIndex.markdownDescription: When enabled, the file watcher may send `ide.file.changed` episodes automatically as you save. **Off by default — nothing is ever ingested without an explicit command or this opt-in.**

statewave.includeGlobs.markdownDescription: Extra globs to include. A match here force-includes a path even if it sits under a default-ignored directory (e.g. `dist/keep/**`).

statewave.excludeGlobs.markdownDescription: Globs to exclude, in addition to the built-in ignore set (node_modules, .git, dist, build, coverage, lockfiles, …).

statewave.redaction.enabled.markdownDescription: Apply best-effort email / phone / API-key redaction to every episode's text before it leaves the editor. On by default.

statewave.compileAfterIngest.markdownDescription: After a successful ingest, compile the workspace subject into durable memory so Copilot/Cursor can retrieve it immediately. On by default. Turn off to ingest episodes without triggering the heavier compile pass.
